nodes.label: Packaging and project-foundation tests.  Verify the project's foundation:  - ``C
The Config class must be defined exactly once across the framework.      The can
Run a snippet in a clean subprocess so utils.py's argv parsing does not interfer
pyproject.toml must parse, list valid deps, and define tooling sections.
setup.py must be a thin shim delegating to pyproject.toml.      The dependency l
.pre-commit-config.yaml must be valid and include core hooks.
All GitHub Actions workflows must parse and define expected jobs.
Pinned runtime locks must exist, be fully pinned, and stay split so the     cros
install.sh must be hardened and free of the historical bugs.
Top-level source files must parse cleanly.
